package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for http_server_without_timeouts: Explicit http.Server{} values that omit common timeout fields.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario384Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
